text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, and the cafeteria is<n>packed with
people. In the midst of it<n>all is Narita Taishin
wearing her<n>trademark grim expression.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I should have one more meat dish...<n>Hmm, I
probably can't eat that much.<n>I could handle a
salad, but I need the<n>protein...
choice_data_list:
You shouldn't force yourself to eat more than you
want.

You shouldn't force yourself to eat more than you
want.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume are known for their<n>ravenous
appetites, but Narita Taishin<n>is a comparatively
light eater.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She always ends up eating to the<n>point of looking
sick, which I can't<n>help but worry about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Shut your pie hole. I should at least<n>eat more than
the others since I'm on<n>the smaller side.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Otherwise... I'll never catch up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! That tenacity of yours is<n>most excellent!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hello there! Sorry for the intrusion!But I guess cutting in out of nowhereis what makes me me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tachyon... What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I imagine you won't be very<n>surprised as to why I
am here, for it is<n>none other than to request your
assistance with an experiment!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Shot down without hesitation!<n>It's not just
your running that's fast,<n>eh, Demon Legs?
However, my<n>friend...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Would you change your mind if I told<n>you that the
medicines I'm sampling<n>out can help with your
diet woes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hear me out. Adjusting your diet is a<n>crucial
aspect of bulking up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As such, I invented two medicines!<n>Medicine A
significantly speeds up<n>digestion, and Medicine B
boosts<n>nutrient absorption!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, I know you seek to obtain a<n>certain body
type, Taishin. So tell me...<n>How do you truly feel
about this?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just so it's clear, I'm not gonna be<n>your guinea
pig. If anything, I'm going<n>to be the one using you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So you mean to say, we have a deal!<n>Very well, let
us start the experiment<n>right awa—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Telling Narita Taishin not to do this<n>likely won't
work since she's so<n>stubborn. But I should at
least<n>suggest the safer-sounding one!
choice_data_list:
Suggest she take the medicine that hastens
digestion.

Suggest she take the medicine that boosts nutrient
absorption.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you jumping in for?<n>Whatever. I was
fine with either<n>choice anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin takes the medicine and,<n>with a
furrowed brow, downs it in one<n>go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No way. This is so cool—I'm getting<n>hungry! I've
still got room for more<n>food!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Eeexcellent. Nothing warms<n>my heart
more than great results!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh! I can definitely get used to this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At first, Narita Taishin is delighted by<n>the
medicine's effects, but before<n>long...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, again?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me, Taishin! Are you still<n>hungry?
Don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll whip you up a midnight snack.<n>Hehe, eat as
much as you want! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, I don't need more— Creek!<n>Dammit, I'm
telling you to stop!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It appears she's decided against<n>taking more of
the medicine after the<n>ordeal she went through.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you jumping in for?<n>Whatever. I was
fine with either<n>choice anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin takes the medicine and,<n>with a
furrowed brow, downs it in one<n>go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I feel like I can run forever. I've<n>got so much
energy to spare!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be satisfied with the<n>medicine's
tangible results.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should use heavier ankle<n>weights now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I've gained some muscle after all!<n>Heh.
